nodes.context: Colombian drug cartel operating in northern Colombia between 1980 and 2010, controlling drug trade along the Caribbean coast.
Colombian drug cartel that killed Gustavo Salazar Bernal and his brother.

edges.evidence_quote: Gustavo Salazar Bernal : Killed in Cartagena on August 30, 2001, by gunman Jhon Fredy Orrego Marín who was associated to the Norte del Valle Cartel . He was killed for being responsible for "losing" a shipment of drugs property of "Los Mellizos" with destiny to Europe. His brother Fernando Salazar Bernal was also killed by the Norte del Valle Cartel .
edges.context: Norte del Valle Cartel killed a member of the North Coast Cartel and his brother.
